description_long: This object is a compact DJ controller, featuring two large jog wheels with faceted surfaces, surrounded by an array of rotary knobs and faders. The front panel is populated with numerous square and rectangular buttons in various pastel colors, likely for cueing, effects, and playback control. Along the top edge, a row of evenly spaced rotary knobs suggests equalizer or effects controls. The central section houses a crossfader and additional sliders, typical for mixing audio channels. The casing is a solid, dark blue plastic with a slightly beveled edge, giving it a robust and modern appearance. The overall design is functional and ergonomic, suitable for tabletop use in urban entertainment or event settings.
description: A compact DJ controller with two large jog wheels, multiple colored buttons, rotary knobs, and sliders on a dark blue plastic body. Designed for tabletop use in music mixing and entertainment.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the jog wheels, colored buttons, and the array of knobs and sliders on the top surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the low profile and the alignment of the knobs and jog wheels along the top.
description_view_2: Opposite angled view emphasizing the symmetry of the jog wheels and the distribution of buttons and controls.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full control layout, including the crossfader, jog wheels, and all buttons and knobs.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, rotary knobs, sliders, jog wheels
